meaning: 弗林特郡[英国威尔士原郡名]
examples: Calvert, of Mostyn, Flintshire, admitted arson and being reckless as to whether life would be endangered.
Flintshire council said emails were accessed at the tribunal's request, and no officers had acted improperly.
About 300 jobs in Llangefni, 1, 300 in Sandycroft, Flintshire, and 1, 300 in Merthyr were safeguarded.
